CVE-2025-26794.title: Exim 4.98 before 4.98.1, when SQLite hints and ETRN serialization ...
CVE-2025-26794.description: Exim 4.98 before 4.98.1, when SQLite hints and ETRN serialization are used, allows remote SQL injection. (Resolving SQL injection requires an update to 4.99.1 in certain non-default rate-limit configurations.)

CVE-2025-30232.title: A use-after-free in Exim 4.96 through 4.98.1 could allow users (w ...
CVE-2025-30232.description: A use-after-free in Exim 4.96 through 4.98.1 could allow users (with command-line access) to escalate privileges.

CVE-2025-67896.title: Exim before 4.99.1, with certain non-default rate-limit configura ...
CVE-2025-67896.description: Exim before 4.99.1, with certain non-default rate-limit configurations, allows a remote heap-based buffer overflow because database records are cast directly to internal structures without validation.

CVE-2026-40684.title: In Exim before 4.99.2, on systems using musl libc (not glibc), an ...
CVE-2026-40684.description: In Exim before 4.99.2, on systems using musl libc (not glibc), an attacker can crash the connection instance when malformed DNS data is present in PTR records. This is caused by a dn_expand oddity in octal printing.

CVE-2026-40685.title: In Exim before 4.99.2, when JSON lookup is enabled, an out-of-bou ...
CVE-2026-40685.description: In Exim before 4.99.2, when JSON lookup is enabled, an out-of-bounds heap write can occur when a JSON operator encounters malformed JSON in an untrusted header, because of an incorrect implementation of \ skipping.

CVE-2026-40686.title: In Exim before 4.99.2, when utf8 operators are enabled, there is  ...
CVE-2026-40686.description: In Exim before 4.99.2, when utf8 operators are enabled, there is an out-of-bounds read if large UTF-8 trailing characters are present (malformed UTF-8 header data). Information might be divulged within an error message produced during handling of an unrelated e-mail message.

CVE-2026-40687.title: In Exim before 4.99.2, when the SPA authentication driver is used ...
CVE-2026-40687.description: In Exim before 4.99.2, when the SPA authentication driver is used with an adversarial SPA resource, there can be an out-of-bounds write that crashes the connection instance, or erroneous data processing that divulges data from uninitialized heap memory.

CVE-2026-45185.title: Exim before 4.99.3, in certain GnuTLS configurations, has a remot ...
CVE-2026-45185.description: Exim before 4.99.3, in certain GnuTLS configurations, has a remotely reachable use-after-free in the BDAT body parsing path. It is triggered when a client sends a TLS close_notify mid-body during a CHUNKING transfer, followed by a final cleartext byte on the same TCP connection. This can lead to heap corruption. An unauthenticated network attacker exploiting this vulnerability could execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2026-48840.title: Exim 4.88 before 4.99.4, in some proxy configurations, mishandles ...
CVE-2026-48840.description: Exim 4.88 before 4.99.4, in some proxy configurations, mishandles certain short payloads, leading to disclosure of uninitialized stack memory values to a client.
